"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.1.2\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E remove -f CMakeFiles\339A___Helpful_Maths.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\339A___Helpful_Maths.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\339A___Helpful_Maths.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\339A___Helpful_Maths.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o 339A___Helpful_Maths.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib339A___Helpful_Maths.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\339A___Helpful_Maths.dir\linklibs.rsp
